trebleClef.title: Treble Clef Path
trebleClef.subtitle: Learn to read notes in the treble clef

rhythm.title: Rhythm Path
rhythm.subtitle: Keep the beat and learn rhythm patterns

boss.title: Boss Challenges
boss.subtitle: Test your mastery with special challenges

tabs.comingSoonHint: This path will unlock in a future update.

modal.premiumMessage: This lesson is part of the full adventure! Ask a grown-up to unlock all the lessons.
modal.subtitle: Add new notes to your collection

descriptions.Meet Middle C: Learn your very first piano note
descriptions.C and D: Add note D to your collection
descriptions.Play C and D: Practice reading C and D on the staff
descriptions.Note Pairs: Match notes in a fun memory game
descriptions.Three Note Songs: Add the third note to your collection
descriptions.Speed C-D-E: How fast can you recognize C, D, and E?
descriptions.Remember C-D-E: Review what you learned in Unit 1
descriptions.Meet F: Learn note F - the fourth finger
descriptions.C to F Journey: Practice reading from C to F
descriptions.Meet G: Complete the five-finger position with G
descriptions.Five Note Songs: Play melodies using all five notes
descriptions.F-G-A Trio: Practice F, G, and A together
descriptions.Almost There: Practice all seven notes learned so far
descriptions.Full Octave Songs: Play melodies across the full octave
descriptions.Octave Memory: Celebrate the octave with a memory game
descriptions.Octave Master: Master the full octave and unlock eighth notes!
descriptions.C and B: Learn Middle C in bass clef
descriptions.Play C and B: Practice reading C and B in bass clef
descriptions.Speed C-B-A: How fast can you recognize C, B, and A in bass clef?
descriptions.First Bass Challenge: Complete your first bass clef unit!
descriptions.Remember Unit 1: Review what you learned in Unit 1
descriptions.Play with G: Learn note G - the fourth finger
descriptions.Five Finger Songs: Play melodies using all five notes
descriptions.Play with D: Practice all seven notes learned so far
descriptions.Octave Mix: Celebrate the octave with a memory game
descriptions.Speed Octave: How fast can you recognize all the notes?
descriptions.Bass Clef Master: Master the full bass clef octave!
descriptions.Quarter Notes: Discover and practice steady quarter notes
descriptions.Meet Half Notes: Learn to hold notes for 2 beats
descriptions.Practice Quarters and Halves: Combine quarter notes and half notes
descriptions.Quarter & Half Speed Drill: How fast can you play quarter and half notes?
descriptions.Meet Whole Notes: Learn to hold notes for 4 full beats
descriptions.Practice Whole Notes: Build confidence holding notes for 4 beats
descriptions.Whole vs. Quarter Contrast: Feel the contrast between whole notes and quarter notes
descriptions.All Basic Durations: Practice with quarters, halves, and wholes
descriptions.Basic Durations Speed Drill: How fast can you play whole, half, and quarter notes?
descriptions.Basic Durations Boss: Master whole, half, and quarter notes!
descriptions.Meet Eighth Notes: Learn to play two notes per beat
descriptions.Practice Eighth Notes: Build confidence with two notes per beat
descriptions.Walking Quarters & Running Eighths: Compare walking quarter notes with running eighth notes
descriptions.Quarters, Halves & Eighths Mix: Mix quarter, half, and eighth notes in patterns
descriptions.Eighth-Note Speed Drill: How fast can you play eighth-note runs?
descriptions.Eighth-Note Boss: Master eighth notes and combined patterns!
descriptions.Meet Quarter Rest: Learn to count rests — 1 beat of silence
descriptions.Practice Rests: Practice quarter and half rests together
descriptions.Meet Whole Rest: Learn 4 beats of silence — a full measure of rest
descriptions.Rests Speed Drill: How fast can you count rests?
descriptions.Rests Boss: Master quarter, half, and whole rests!
descriptions.Waltz Time (3/4): Learn to play in 3/4 time — 3 beats per measure
descriptions.Practice All Dotted Notes: Master both dotted half and dotted quarter notes
descriptions.Dotted-Note Speed Drill: How fast can you play dotted-note rhythms?
descriptions.Meet Sixteenth Notes: Learn to play four notes per beat
descriptions.Practice Sixteenth Notes: Groups of four — one beat at a time
descriptions.Sixteenths and Eighths: Mix sixteenth notes with eighth notes
descriptions.All-Duration Mix: Mix quarter, half, eighth, and sixteenth notes in patterns
descriptions.All-Duration Speed Drill: How fast can you play every duration?
descriptions.Sharps Together: Play all three sharp notes side by side
descriptions.Sharps and Friends: Mix sharps with natural notes in melodies
descriptions.Sharps in Context: Mix sharps with familiar notes in real melodies
descriptions.Sharp Memory: Match sharp notes in a memory game
descriptions.Sharp Speed: Race the clock to name sharp notes
descriptions.Sharp Star: Master all three sharp notes in the ultimate challenge!
descriptions.Flats Together: Play all flat notes side by side
descriptions.Flats in Context: Find flat notes mixed with familiar notes
descriptions.Flat Memory: Match flat notes in a memory game
descriptions.Flat Speed: Race the clock to name flat notes
descriptions.Flat Star: Master all flat notes in the ultimate challenge!
descriptions.Flat Master: Master all four flat notes in the ultimate challenge!
descriptions.Accidentals Master: Face all seven accidentals in one epic challenge!
descriptions.Meet G Major: Learn to read music with one sharp — F♯
descriptions.G Major Practice: Practice sight reading in G major
descriptions.Meet D Major: Learn to read music with two sharps — F♯ and C♯
descriptions.D Major Practice: Practice sight reading in D major
descriptions.Meet A Major: Learn to read music with three sharps — F♯, C♯, and G♯
descriptions.A Major Practice: Practice sight reading in A major
descriptions.Meet F Major: Learn to read music with one flat — B♭
descriptions.F Major Practice: Practice sight reading in F major
descriptions.Meet Bb Major: Learn to read music with two flats — B♭ and E♭
descriptions.Bb Major Practice: Practice sight reading in B♭ major
descriptions.Meet Eb Major: Learn to read music with three flats — B♭, E♭, and A♭
descriptions.Eb Major Practice: Practice sight reading in E♭ major
descriptions.Key Sig Memory Mix-Up: Match key signatures in a memory game
descriptions.Key Signature Master: Master all six key signatures in one epic challenge!
descriptions.Dotted-Quarter Pulse in 6/8: Feel the two dotted-quarter pulses of 6/8 time
descriptions.Counting Six Eighths: Count six eighth notes per bar in 6/8
descriptions.Quarters in 6/8: Add quarter notes — two eighth-note subdivisions each — to the 6/8 pulse
descriptions.Eighths in 6/8: Add eighth notes — the natural subdivision of 6/8
descriptions.6/8 Speed Drill: How fast can you play 6/8 patterns?
descriptions.Hold-Across Warm-Up: Re-ground in 4/4 with long notes that hover over the beat
descriptions.Surprise Beat: Listen & Echo: Hear an off-beat surprise — a sound where the beat isn't!
descriptions.Read the Off-Beat: Spot the syncopated bar — detective mode
descriptions.Body Split: Tap the pulse and the off-beat together
descriptions.Build a Syncopation: Pick tiles, build a 2-bar phrase, hear it play!
descriptions.Off-Beat Speed Drill: How fast can you tap syncopated rhythms?
descriptions.Syncopation Boss: Master off-beat magic — capstone of the unit!

pathCompleteMessages.treble_clef: You've mastered all Treble Clef notes!
